debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
h : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
hp : p % 4 = 1
⊢ ∃ a b, a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨x, y, z, h1, h2, _, _⟩ := Zagier.exists_fixed_point_g p hp
  use x.natAbs, 2 * y.natAbs
  zify
  rw [h2, h1]

let S := {t : ℕ × ℕ × ℕ | t.1 ^ 2 + 4 * t.2.1 * t.2.2 = p}
  have hS : S.Finite := finite_S p
  obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, ht, hg⟩ := hS.toFinset.exists_fixed_point_of_odd_card
    (fun ⟨x, y, z⟩ ht => by rwa [Set.Finite.mem_toFinset, Set.mem_setOf_eq, mul_comm y z] at ht)
    (fun _ _ => rfl) (windmill_Odd p hp)
  injection hg; subst_vars
  exact ⟨x, 2 * y, by rwa [Set.Finite.mem_toFinset, Set.mem_setOf_eq, ← pow_two, ← mul_pow] at ht⟩

haveI : Fact (p % 4 = 1) := ⟨hp⟩
  obtain ⟨x, y, z, h_p⟩ := (windmill p).fixed_point_of_involution₂
  use x, 2 * y
  nlinarith

let S := Zagier.S p
  have h_fixed := Zagier.exists_unique_fixed_point_f₁ p hp
  have h_odd := Zagier.odd_card_fixed_points_f₂ p hp h_fixed
  obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hxyz, h_fix⟩ := Zagier.exists_fixed_point_f₂ p hp h_odd
  exact ⟨x, 2 * y, by rw [← hxyz.2.2.2, (Zagier.f₂_fixed_point_iff hxyz).mp h_fix]; ring⟩

obtain ⟨x, y, z, hS, h_fix⟩ := Zagier.prop_2 p hp
  exact ⟨x, 2 * y, by rw [← Zagier.S_prop p x y z hS, h_fix]; ring⟩

obtain ⟨x, y, z, hx, rfl⟩ := exists_fixed_point p hp
  exact ⟨x, 2 * y, by rw [← hx]; ring⟩

obtain ⟨x, y, z, h_sq, h_yz⟩ := Zagier p hp
  use x, 2 * y
  rw [← h_sq, h_yz]
  ring

obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hx, -, hg⟩ := exists_fixed_point_of_involution_of_odd_card h.out hp
  injection hg with _ h; exact ⟨x, 2 * y, by rw [← hx, h]; ring⟩

obtain ⟨x, y, z, hx, rfl⟩ := Zagier.exists_fixed_point hp
  exact ⟨x, 2 * y, by rw [← hx]; ring⟩

obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := Windmill.exists_fixed_point_g p hp
  use x.x, 2 * x.y
  rw [← x.hx, (Windmill.g_fixed_point_iff x).mp hx]
  ring

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hxyz⟩, _, hg⟩ := Zagier.hg_fixed p hp
  use x, 2 * y
  simp [Zagier.g, Subtype.ext_iff] at hg
  rw [← hxyz, hg]
  ring

obtain ⟨x, y, z, h_inv, rfl⟩ := exists_sq_add_four_mul_mul_v2 p hp
  exact ⟨x, 2 * y, by rw [← h_inv]; ring⟩

obtain ⟨x, y, z, hxyz, rfl⟩ := exists_windmill hp
  exact ⟨x, 2 * y, by rw [← hxyz]; ring⟩
